SAKURA_MOD_LABYRINTH.title: Labyrinth
SAKURA_MOD_LABYRINTH.description: This enemy is lost in the Labyrinth. It cannot act or be targeted by cards or effects. Its existing statuses continue to resolve normally.
SAKURA_MOD_LABYRINTH_RELEASE_WARNING.des: This enemy will leave the Labyrinth at the end of this turn. Its next intent is shown beside this icon.
